title: The Bronc Stomper

actors: Don Coleman, Ben Corbett, Tom London, Bud Osborne
plot: Richard Thurston, a champion rodeo rider, is prevented from competing in a rodeo by the event's crooked chairman Riggs, who has bet a sizable amount of money on another rider and doesn't ...
